arts.ttl: Newcastle issue hands-off warning to Barcelona amid interest in key player
arts.sum: Newcastle are determined to keep hold of their key players this summer amid strong interest from clubs across Europe, one of which is Barcelona. The La Liga giants are said to be keen on a move for Sandro Tonali, who has been a revelation for the Carabao Cup winners since returning to football in August […] The post Newcastle issue hands-off warning to Barcelona amid interest in key player appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Why are Barcelona playing Osasuna during the international break?
arts.sum: Both clubs appealed for the date of the rescheduled fixture to be changed

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick offers Cubarsi update and confirms defensive plans for Osasuna
arts.sum: Flick also confirmed that Cubarsí’s injury isn’t serious and he probably will be ready for Sunday’s clash with Girona, but the coach doesn’t want to risk anything on Thursday and will choose to give his young defensive star a few more days to get fully healthy. They told me the players are ready and that playing every three days isn’t too much for them.

arts.ttl: Flick criticises turnaround after international break
arts.sum: Hansi Flick is unhappy that Raphinha and Ronald Araujo will miss Barcelona's rescheduled La Liga game against Osasuna.

arts.ttl: Key Barcelona trio are ruled out of Osasuna battle as Hansi Flick issues update ahead of controversial La Liga clash
arts.sum: Barcelona head coach Hansi Flick confirms that Ronald Araujo, Raphinha and Pau Cubarsi will miss Thursday's controversial La Liga match with Osasuna.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick reveals the Barcelona players who will miss Osasuna match
arts.sum: Barcelona manager Hansi Flick was refreshingly transparent with his team news ahead of Thursday's controversial La Liga meeting with Osasuna.

arts.ttl: Emi Martinez and Argentina stars repeat infamous Kylian Mbappe chant to mock Raphinha
arts.sum: Barcelona winger Raphinha had vowed to score for Brazil against Argentina and 'beat them up' during Tuesday's World Cup qualifier which they eventually lost 4-1

arts.ttl: Bellingham, Yamal & Co - Which U21 stars have played the most club minutes this season?
arts.sum: It’s arguably never been as important for European clubs to integrate youngsters into their first-team. There’s few more satisfying feelings for supporters than to watch a young player...

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick: 'Raphinha and Araujo won't be in the squad'
arts.sum: The German coach appeared to be unhappy with the date of the rearranged fixture between Barça and Osasuna but also admitted, "the squad has enough quality to overcome anyone despite some players missing," in his pre game press conference at the Ciutat Esportiva. The coach will not all his fit players available for the game, and of those who are up for selection, several have barely trained since coming back from international duty.

arts.ttl: “I’m not happy about it, it’s not about Real Madrid v Barcelona” – Hansi Flick on Osasuna fixture
arts.sum: Barcelona manager Hansi Flick started off with a pointed statement about the scheduling of games in Spanish football ahead of their clash with Osasuna on Thursday night. The Blaugrana’s postponed fixture was rearranged, with some of their players coming back with less than 48 hours between their international fixtures.
